strengths: 19+ years of fullstack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI-agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture: TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is dated and peripheral (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018)
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention; testing tooling evidence is largely from the D ecosystem and Selenium

key_factors.factor: AI agent development experience (MCP, agentic tooling)
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java depth

response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node/React fullstack delivery, testing rigor, cloud/containerization, and AI agent development. The candidate evidences all four: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK pricing work at Optilyz, TDD and CI/CD practice at RIDE, Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective, and MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq — the last being a rare, explicitly required skill. Databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) and Git are covered. Gaps are framework-specific rather than fundamental: Nest.js is unmentioned, Kotlin absent, Java stale, and Vitest/Jest/Playwright are not named despite deep general testing expertise. Given 6+ years required versus ~19 delivered across the exact primary stack, plus the AI-agent requirement met, these gaps are learnable and secondary.
